posts.text:
I’m taking this as a compliment- because it means some of the biggest anti groups are afraid of my work 💅

Video

We deliberately didn’t name this woman so please honor that and comments.

For more info on criminalization check out @PregnancyJust. If you need legal help as a patient or health practitioner call If/When/How’s free Repro Helpline: 844-868-2812

A 31-year-old in Georgia has been arrested and charged with murder for allegedly ending her pregnancy with abortion medication.

Here’s what we know:

Video

Arizona Republicans are advancing legislation that would effectively ban pro-choice speech on college campuses. 

And remember—abortion is legal in Arizona.

Video

We need to talk about how disgusting Kansas Republicans are: they are trying to sneak an Abortion Ban INTO an Equal Rights Amendment.

More at the newsletter (link in bio).

Video

It's Abortion Provider Appreciation Day.

Thank you to all of the providers who put their safety and lives on the line to ensure we can get the care we need. You've helped me to build the life and family I have now, and there's no way to articulate the depth of my gratitude.

Happening today! jessica.substack.com/p/pro-c…


Jessica Valenti (@JessicaValenti)

Abortion, Every Day is hosting a special virtual event with Dr. Shelley Sella on Tuesday, March 10.

AED will make her talk available to everyone, regardless if they subscribe to the newsletter, but paying members can join us live: open.substack.com/live-strea…





— https://nitter.net/JessicaValenti/status/2029590361740325354#m

If you want to join us live and help power the kind of independent journalism and organizing that refuses to be silenced, I hope you’ll support Abortion, Every Day with a paying membership. 

You can find the link in my bio.

This isn’t just about one speech or one school—we are in a make or break moment that will determine whether abortion becomes not just illegal, but unmentionable.

What we do now matters.

Abortion, Every Day is hosting a special virtual event with Dr. Shelley Sella on Tuesday, March 10.

AED will make her talk available to everyone, regardless if they subscribe to the newsletter, but paying members can join us live: open.substack.com/live-strea…

Republicans don’t just want abortion illegal—they want it unspeakable.

Recently, these supposed free speech enthusiasts got an abortion providers' speech canceled at Texas Tech claiming it would constitute “illegal activity.”

So we're giving her the platform conservatives took away.

SACRED FERTILITY 🥴

Video

Publicly supporting women is nice, but what really matters is what men do behind closed doors. What matters is how they hold each other accountable.

The men’s hockey team shouldn’t get a pass because they were in the locker room—that’s where women need their support the most.

Full colum at the link in my bio.
This isn't my newsletter's usual beat, but I had to write something about the US Men's Hockey Team locker room talk.

I don't follow figure skating, so I couldn't figure out why I started sobbing while watching Alysa Liu's gold medal-winning performance.  

Then it dawned on me: I was watching a young woman be free.

jessica.substack.com/p/alysa…

Justice for Adriana Smith

Video

I've said it before and I’ll say it again: their extremism is getting more explicit by the day. Punishing women—which used to be an untouchable issue within the anti-abortion movement—is now being discussed freely.

Meet Rep. Monty Fritts— a Tennessee lawmaker running for governor. If you’re one of the millions of American women who’s had an abortion, he thinks that you should be given the death penalty.

Video

I’m calling it now: Republicans will try to make hormonal birth control illegal for teenagers

Video
While we're talking about the radicalization of young men, make sure not to miss this story jessica.substack.com/p/20-year-ol...

Kudos to Politico, which has been reporting on the national abortion in the water bullshit for a while now. Because for the most part, there are VERY few mainstream publications covering this issue. 

That's why I'm writing about it every day. That publishing pace really is necessary!

All of which is to say, Republicans are testing these batshit strategies out *for a reason*. When we dismiss them as too extreme to actually pass or make an impact, we're giving them exactly what they want

And though Politico says this new bill is the first federal legislation to test out Republicans' "abortion in the water" tactic, that's actually not true! 

They tried the same thing last year in the “Respectful Treatment of Unborn Remains Act"
 
jessica.substack.com/p/republican...

Republicans are introducing federal legislation that would mandate women use "catch kits" during a miscarriage or abortion—collecting their pregnancy remains as medical waste. 

They tested out that strategy in the states for years, via bills largely dismissed as too radical to take seriously

They've introduced bills across the country that would mandate testing the water for abortion pills AND birth control. 

Because these bills are inarguably fucking nuts, people largely dismissed the effort as long-shot extremism that has no chance of advancing. 

But check out Politico today

Well we got a perfect example of what I mean just today.

I've warned for years that conservatives are trying to ban abortion pills by claiming that the medication—and abortion remains—are poisoning the groundwater. Antis say we're all "drinking abortions."

jessica.substack.com/i/176663692/...
I think about that tweet ALL THE TIME

There’s a reason I make a big fucking deal out of every single batshit bill—because more often than not the antiabortion legislation everyone ignores or dismisses ends up a major legislative trend. 

People need to wake up and realize conservatives are floating trial balloons CONSTANTLY

I also wrote in tonight’s newsletter about legislation that will effectively ban the regulation of crisis pregnancy centers. I first flagged the legislation last year when it was just in Wyoming. Now it’s been passed in two states and advancing in four others. 

Same thing with “Baby Olivia” bills

Regardless of whether bills like this pass, it’s vital we’re paying attention—Republicans are giving us a clear roadmap!

I remember when everyone said bills charging abortion patients with murder were never going anywhere—now over a dozen states have considered them & they’re gaining steam daily

For anyone up late and eager to be pissed off: Ohio Republicans have introduced a bill that would require every pregnancy to be registered with the state and given a "certificate of life" 

jessica.substack.com/p/ohio-gop-w...
I’m taking this as a compliment- because it means some of the biggest anti groups are afraid of my work 💅

We deliberately didn’t name this woman so please honor that and comments. 

For more info on criminalization check out @pregnancyjust.bsky.social. If you need legal help as a patient or health practitioner call If/When/How’s free Repro Helpline: 844-868-2812

A 31-year-old in Georgia has been arrested and charged with murder for allegedly ending her pregnancy with abortion medication. 

Here’s what we know: jessica.substack.com/p/a-georgia-...

Today in extremely obvious news: New York Magazine reports that female right-wingers are leaving the ‘new right’ in droves. A classic case of “I never thought the leopards would eat my face.”

nymag.com/intelligence...
Read more at the newsletter and spread the word: jessica.substack.com/i/190457106/...

Arizona Republicans are advancing legislation that would effectively ban pro-choice speech on college campuses. 

And remember—abortion is legal in Arizona.

We need to talk about how disgusting Kansas Republicans are: they are trying to sneak an Abortion Ban INTO an Equal Rights Amendment. 

Read more: jessica.substack.com/i/190457106/...
Kansas Republicans are trying to ban abortion by proposing an EQUAL RIGHTS AMENDMENT and sneaking fetal personhood language in
Why is the mainstream media not covering abortion??
I am taking this as a compliment - because it means my work is scaring some of the biggest anti groups 💅 #feminism #maternalhealth #fyp #politics

More info at the newsletter—but we’re deliberately not sharing this woman’s name, so please honor that in comments.  For free legal help as a patient or health practitioner, call @If/When/How’s free Repro Helpline: 844-868-2812. For more info on criminalization, check out @pregnancyjust
Replying to @KD
HB 2060 in Arizona is just the tip of the iceberg #feminism #arizona #politics #fyp

This is what I keep in mind when facing the daily grind of anti-abortion attacks. I hope it can help someone else out there. Thank you @Reproductive Freedom for All and @Mini Timmaraju for having me! #prochoice #abortionrights
Absolutely shameless #feminism #sexism #kansas #politics  #greenscreen
It *is* that deep, actually #sexism #feminism #realitytv #politics
It’s not an accident that the Trump administration nominated an anti-contraception nut to be the nation’s top doctor #politics #feminism #prochoice #birthcontrol
Why is the US criminalizing pregnancy loss? @pregnancyjust’s outlines the facts in the latest Abortion, Every Day live chat. #pregnancyloss #miscarriage #feminism #prochoice
